title: Airtable field name mismatch
symptom: API call to create or update records fails with 'UNKNOWN_FIELD_NAME'. The field exists visually in the Airtable base but the API rejects it.

title: Airtable linked record expects array of record IDs
symptom: Creating or updating a record fails with 'INVALID_VALUE_FOR_COLUMN' on a linked record field. Passing a string value instead of an array.
